properties.name: exam.events.exchange
properties.description: RabbitMQ exchange for exam submitted events.

properties.name: exam.events.routing-key
properties.description: Routing key used to bind exam submitted events.

properties.name: study.events.exam-submitted.queue
properties.description: Queue that receives exam submitted events in study service.

properties.name: auth.events.exchange
properties.description: RabbitMQ exchange for auth profile synchronization events.

properties.name: auth.events.user-profile-sync-routing-key
properties.description: Routing key used to bind user profile sync events from auth service.

properties.name: auth.events.user-profile-sync.queue
properties.description: Queue name receiving user profile synchronization events for study service.
